modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be no spelling errors and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: 25Live fails to load with a fatal error message.

full_description_text: User attempted to log into 25Live. An error occurred, displaying opensaml::FatalprofileException. The error message suggests contacting the administrator for further assistance. The issue was logged with an activity ID for reference.
short_description: 25Live fails to load with a fatal error message.
description: User attempted to log into 25Live. An error occurred, displaying opensaml::FatalprofileException. The error message suggests contacting the administrator for further assistance. The issue was logged with an activity ID for reference.
